name: browser-autonomy
description: Makes Codex more self-reliant for browser work, including safe use of existing sessions, autofill, and login flows.

interface.shortDescription: Do browser tasks directly, including safe login flows.
interface.longDescription: Browser Autonomy teaches Codex to operate websites itself instead of asking the user to click around, while using existing sessions and password-manager autofill safely.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Browser Autonomy for web browsing, site operation, login flows, and browser verification. Do the browser work yourself whenever it is safe and possible.
